name: Trade Modal
description: A trade execution modal for buying or selling securities with order-type selection, quantity/price inputs, live market info, estimated total calculation, fee breakdown, and order-preview confirmation before execution.

buy.description: Green-accented buy-side trade modal for market, limit, or stop purchases. Direction toggle locked to Buy. Confirm button uses success color scheme to reinforce purchase intent and prevent direction errors.

sell.description: Red-accented sell-side trade modal mirroring the buy preset with direction locked to Sell. Confirm button uses destructive color. Surfaces position-held indicator to ensure voluntary sale does not exceed current holdings.

limit.description: Order-type expanded preset showing both quantity and limit-price inputs side-by-side. Calculates estimated total live as price changes. Used when user wants explicit price control rather than market execution.

visual_brief: A focused modal dialog rendered as a d-surface card floating centered over a backdrop-blur overlay, max-width 480px. Top of modal displays the security symbol in text-2xl bold mono-data ('AAPL') with company name in text-sm muted beneath, and a close X icon button in the top-right corner. A DirectionToggle appears as a two-segment pill (Buy/Sell) with the active side filled in accent color (success green for buy, destructive red for sell) and the inactive side ghosted. Below, OrderTypeTabs render as a three-segment underline-style tabstrip (Market / Limit / Stop) with the active tab showing a primary-colored underline and semibold label. The form body shows a QuantityInput with plus/minus steppers flanking a mono-data numeric input showing share count, labeled 'Quantity' above. When limit or stop is active, a PriceInput appears labeled 'Limit Price' or 'Stop Price' with a currency-symbol prefix and mono-data numeric field. MarketInfo sits as an inline callout row displaying 'Last: $178.42 | Bid: $178.40 | Ask: $178.44 | 24h: +1.23%' in compact d-annotation mono-data. The EstimatedTotal calculates live as 'Est. Total: $17,842.00' in text-lg semibold mono-data. A FeeBreakdown expands below as a small itemized list: 'Commission: $0.00, Exchange fee: $0.03, Total fees: $0.03'. An OrderPreview sub-card (secondary surface, subtle border) previews the complete order in human language: 'Buy 100 shares of AAPL at market, estimated $17,842.00'. Finally, a ConfirmButton spans the full width in the direction-appropriate color (success green for buy, destructive red for sell) with text like 'Place Buy Order' or 'Place Sell Order'. Button press opens a secondary confirmation dialog requiring a second explicit click. Validation warnings appear inline (insufficient balance, exceeds position) in amber or red annotation chips above the confirm button.

layout_hints.note: Trade execution is irrevocable financial action. Two-step confirmation required. Color-code aggressively to prevent buy/sell direction errors. Always show estimated total and fees before confirm.
layout_hints.direction_colors: Buy=success/emerald, Sell=destructive/red. These colors MUST be consistent across DirectionToggle, ConfirmButton, and EstimatedTotal emphasis. Color-code text and borders, not just fills.
layout_hints.market_info: MarketInfo uses d-annotation with live-updating bid/ask/last. Refresh indicator (pulsing dot) shows data freshness. Stale data >5s triggers amber warning.
layout_hints.order_preview: OrderPreview is a human-language restatement of the order parameters. Critical for preventing fat-finger errors. Must update live as inputs change.
layout_hints.fee_transparency: FeeBreakdown MUST itemize every fee (commission, exchange, SEC, regulatory). Total fees visible before confirm. Never hide fees in footnotes.

slots.header: Top section showing security symbol (mono-data text-2xl bold), company name (text-sm muted), and a close icon-button in the top-right corner. Optionally includes a position-held indicator showing current shares owned.
slots.direction-toggle: Two-segment pill toggle for Buy/Sell direction. Active side filled with direction-color (success for buy, destructive for sell). Determines color scheme of entire modal including ConfirmButton.
slots.order-type-tabs: Three-segment tabstrip (Market / Limit / Stop) with underline indicator on active tab. Tab selection shows/hides PriceInput and changes execution semantics.
slots.quantity-input: Numeric input with plus/minus steppers for share-count entry. Uses mono-data tabular-nums. Label above reads 'Quantity'. Validates against available balance (buy) or current position (sell).
slots.price-input: Conditional input (shown for Limit and Stop order types) with currency-symbol prefix and mono-data numeric field. Label above reads 'Limit Price' or 'Stop Price' based on active tab.
slots.market-info: Inline callout row displaying live market data: Last, Bid, Ask, and 24h change. Uses mono-data compact text. Pulsing indicator shows refresh freshness.
slots.estimated-total: Large-text calculated total (quantity × price) with fee-inclusive and fee-exclusive variants. Updates live as inputs change.
slots.fee-breakdown: Itemized fee list (commission, exchange, regulatory) in small d-annotation text. Expandable if fees are complex. Total fees always visible.
slots.order-preview: Secondary sub-card showing human-language restatement of the complete order. Updates live. Critical readback to prevent fat-finger errors.
slots.confirm-button: Full-width primary button in direction-appropriate color. Opens secondary confirmation dialog on first click. Only executes order after second explicit confirmation.
slots.validation-warnings: Inline chips above confirm button showing validation errors (insufficient balance, exceeds position, market closed). Color-coded amber (warning) or red (blocking).

keyboard: Tab: cycle through order-type tabs and inputs
Enter: advance to confirmation dialog from ConfirmButton
Escape: close modal without executing order

responsive.mobile: Modal expands to full-screen sheet rising from bottom with rounded top corners. DirectionToggle and OrderTypeTabs remain at top. Inputs stack vertically with full-width. ConfirmButton sticky at bottom of sheet.
responsive.tablet: Standard centered modal at max-w-480px. Minor padding adjustments.

micro.tab-switch: underline slide to active tab 200ms ease-out

transitions.preview-update: OrderPreview text cross-fade 150ms ease-out on input change

ambient.market-data-pulse: MarketInfo freshness dot opacity 0.4 to 1.0 to 0.4 1s ease-in-out infinite
ambient.stale-data-warning: MarketInfo border flash amber when data >5s stale

composition.TradeModal: Modal(d-surface, backdrop-blur, max-w-480) > [Header + DirectionToggle + OrderTypeTab[] + QuantityInput + PriceInput? + MarketInfo + EstimatedTotal + FeeBreakdown + OrderPreview + ValidationWarnings? + ConfirmButton]
